title: Tower of Hell Advanced Mechanics & Records Quiz

questions.q: What is the exact speed multiplier applied when the 'Low Gravity' modifier is active?

a: Camera flips upside down with reduced visibility
Camera inverts controls with white fog
Camera rotates 180 degrees with black fog

questions.q: In the section 'Dysphoric', what is the primary obstacle mechanic that players must navigate?
a: Moving kill parts in a maze pattern

a: Platforms disappear based on player proximity
